ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE GENERAL REQUIREMENT IS FOR AIRCRAFT MAINTENANCE AND CONTRACTOR LOGISTICS SUPPORT OF T-45 AIRCRAFT. THIS ACTION PROVIDES FOR PILOT PRODUCTION RECOVERY WORK TO SUPPLEMENT THOSE MAINTENANCE ACTIVITIES. N61340-19-RFPREQ-PMA-273-0163

ns1:principalNAICSCode.description: OTHER SUPPORT ACTIVITIES FOR AIR TRANSPORTATION
